div.head: NSC0020 - May 25, 1989 - Counter Narcotics in Peru, Review of National Security Review 12 - Section IV Regarding Arms Control Implications of Defense Strategy [2]Source: George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSC Meetings Files, OA/ID 90001-005, NSC0020-May 25, 1989-Counter Narcotics in Peru, Review of National Security Review 12-Section IV Regarding Arms Control Implications of Defense Strategy [2]. Secret. Prepared by Davis. Copied to Quayle and Sununu. According to the President's Daily Diary, on May 25 Bush presided over a meeting of the National Security Council in the Cabinet Room lasting from 9:39-11:04 a.m. No minutes were found.
div.p: SECRET RECORD IDSS9Z0528y NSC/S PROFILE RECEIVED: 23 MAY 89 14 TO: PRESIDENT FROM: SCOWCROFT DOC DATE: 24 MAY 89 SOURCE REF: KEYWORDS: ARMS CONTROL DEFENSE POLICY START INF ICBM NSR | PERSONS:: SUBJECT: PRES TALKERS FOR NSC MTG ON 25 MAY RE NSR 12 PART IV / SECURITY & | ARMS CONTROL ACTION: NOTED BY PRES DUE DATE: 11 JUN 90 STATUS: C STAFF OFFICER; DAVIS LOGREF: 8920454 8920540 FILE Om oe s Prsoczegh SR0012 CODES: pL BNsoc DOCUMENT DISTRIBUTION FOR ACTION FOR CONCURRENCE FOR INFO White House Guidelines E.0. 12958, SEC 3.4 (B) September 11, 2006 By cap NARA, Date alip/oy COMMENTS: DISPATCHED BY DATE BY HAND W/ATTCH OPENED BY: LF CLOSED BY: LF Doc 40F 4 es.

eno es ' ' «THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON May 25, 1989, YY | Mr. President: We will almost certainly not get | past a very introductory discussion of this issue at the meetint today. Therefore you can simply listen and need not attack this huge package. Brent Scowcroft

7] Participants The President | The Vice President The Secretary of State ~ | The Secretary of Treasury The Secretary of Defense The Secretary of Energy. The Director, Office of Management and Budget.- The Director of Central Intelligence Chief of Staff to the.President --. | Assistant to the President for National Security Affairs | Chairman, Joint Chiefs of Staff Head of Delegation on Nuclear and Space Talks Director, Arms Control and: Disarmament Agency Deputy Assistant to the President for National Security Affairs

t s tiaie fe UNCLASSIFIED RECORD IDSMGSZ005a07 NSC/S PROFILE RECEIVED: 10 MAY 89 12 TO: SCOWCROFT FROM: HAGIN, J DOC DATE: 10 MAY 89 SOURCE REF: KEYWORDS: NSC SYSTEM PERSONS: | SUBJECT: APPROVED PRESIDENTIAL ACTIVITY RE NSC MTG 25 MAY ACTION: FOR RECORD PURPOSES DUE DATE: 11 JUN 90 STATUS: C STAFF OFFICER: NONE LOGREF: 8920528 8920540 FILES: @1FM_0 scp wW$0020 | CODES: eel a DOCUMENT DISTRIBUTION | FOR ACTION FOR CONCURRENCE FOR_INFO COMMENTS: DISPATCHED BY DATE BY HAND W/ATTCH OPENED BY: LF CLOSED BY: LF Doc 10F 1 UNCLASSIFIED

' a Ww 5/10/89 THE WHITE HOUSE s Qo4Sy WASHINGTON MEMORANDUM TO: General Scowcroft FROM: JOSEPH W. HAGIN SUBJECT: APPROVED PRESIDENTIAL ACTIVITY EVENT: NSC Meeting DATE: May 25, 1989 TIME: 9:30 a.m. DURATION: 60 minutes t LOCATION: Cabinet Room ATTIRE: Business Suit REMARKS REQUIRED: No | MEDIACOVERAGE: Closed FIRST LADY PARTICIPATION: No ADDITIONAL INFORMATION: CONTACT: TELEPHONE: OFFICE HOME NOTE: PROJECT OFFICER, SEE ATTACHED CHECKLIST Ed Rogers Marlin Fitzwater David Bates James Cicconi David Demarest David Valdez Fred McClure Jean Lamb USSS - PPD Susan Porter Rose Steve Studdert Gary Walters Patty Presock John Keller WHCA Audio/Visual Chriss Winston Tim McBride WHCA Operations Laurie Firestone J. Bonnie Newman Amy Louisa Buckley Robert Guttman Tony Lopez C. Boyden Gray Bruce Zanca
